ec2.launchtemplate.CfnAbout: Specifies a launch template for an Amazon EC2 instance. A launch template contains the parameters to launch an instance. For more information, see [Launch an instance from a launch template](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/WindowsGuide/ec2-launch-templates.html) in the *Amazon EC2 User Guide*.

ec2.launchtemplate.LaunchTemplateData.Description: The information for the launch template.

ec2.launchtemplate.LaunchTemplateName.Description: A name for the launch template.

ec2.launchtemplate.TagSpecifications.Description: The tags to apply to the launch template during creation.
